---
title: "Gapminder Data Analysis"
---

The Gapminder dataset contains life expectancy, GDP per capita, and population information for 142 countries every five years from 1952 and 2007.

### Basic Data Exploration
- [Life Expectancy and GDP per Capita](life-gdp.qmd)
- [Life Expectancy and Population](life-population.qmd)
- [Country Analysis](country.qmd)
